blended.narrative: Showdown Montana is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,591 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Friday: 7" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 42".
